title: citrus × aurantium subf. canaliculata
intro: Citrus × aurantium subf. canaliculata, also known as bitter orange peel, is a plant derived from the Citrus aurantium variety, which is a hybrid of the orange and the pomelo. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include stimulating digestion, improving circulation, and acting as a natural diuretic. The health benefits of Citrus × aurantium subf. canaliculata include reducing anxiety and stress, improving mood, and aiding in weight loss, making it a popular ingredient in herbal weight loss supplements. Citrus × aurantium subf. canaliculata can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, capsules, and extracts, which are often used in aromatherapy and herbal remedies.
